description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined olive-green fuselage and distinct white cross insignias on the wings and tail, reminiscent of World War II German aircraft. The wings are straight and low-mounted, with visible ailerons and flaps, and the tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer with a cross insignia and a horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned just behind the propeller, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The landing gear is a taildragger type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is integrated smoothly into the fuselage. The surface finish is matte, and the airplane is primarily constructed from metal, likely aluminum, with some glass for the canopy and rubber for the tires.
description: A matte olive-green, single-propeller military airplane with white cross insignias, low-mounted straight wings, and a taildragger landing gear. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned near the nose, with a streamlined fuselage and conventional tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the cockpit canopy, propeller, and tail details, including the cross insignia and tail number.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical low-mounted wings with visible insignias.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, cockpit, and tail, with landing gear visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail structure, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the back of the wings and fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a three-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
